title: Perfectly Smoky Vietnamese Runner Beans Bake
description: A romantic Vietnamese dish featuring smoky runner beans, baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven, and is FODMAP-friendly. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of runner beans with the depth of smoky flavors.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, olive oil, garlic-infused oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the runner beans to the bowl and toss to coat with the smoky mixture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the coated runner beans in a single layer.
Bake the runner beans in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and brush the runner beans with fish sauce and lime juice.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the runner beans are tender and caramelized.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve the smoky runner beans hot, straight from the oven.
